sessions.title: HOA Governance & Compliance Open Items Review
sessions.summary: Reviewed governance minutes for open items and unanswered questions

sessions.title: Plantation at Leesburg website direct access review #11
sessions.summary: 109 HOA/Golf Course docs cataloged, deduped, converted, and stored in D:\HOA; 2024–2026 profitability computed

open_items.question: What is the specific completion date by which the 2023 and 2024 audits will be finished and posted? Who is the CPA firm? What is the engagement letter date?

open_items.item: Cranes Roost golf course irrigation system repair
open_items.question: What is the vendor name, repair estimate, and expected completion date? Why was there no publicly communicated repair timeline after 2+ months of failure?

open_items.item: 2026 vendor bids and contracts missing from HOA website
open_items.question: Why are 2026 vendor bids and contracts absent from the Contracts section more than 18 months after the statutory deadline? Is the board intentionally excluding Ashley pool renovation and road maintenance contracts?

open_items.item: Frisillo v. Plantation at Leesburg HOA lawsuit
open_items.question: What is the full complaint content? What damages are sought? How does this intersect with the active Fredericks/Eisenhower suit?
open_items.deadline: Case filed November 7, 2025; contents not publicly available

open_items.question: Will the board bring CCF back for re-vote? If so, when? What changes are proposed given it fell 41 votes short?
Was the CCR 10% annual transfer cap violated in 2025? What are the exact cumulative transfers for 2025 against the $507,600 limit?
Was the February 2025 strategy deck 'positive news only' Facebook page created? Is HOA staff time or funds being used? What is the budget line item?
open_items.deadline: Strategy deck proposed February 2025; status unclear

open_items.item: 2025 golf course cash flow projection validation
open_items.question: Was the board's October 2024 projection of ~$229,000 positive golf cash flow accurate? What is the verified EBITDA for 2025 vs. 2024?
open_items.deadline: Projection was for 2025; year-end data needed

open_items.question: Are there board resolutions authorizing the Nov-Dec 2024 reserve withdrawals (~$194K)? What happened to the $84,223.59 gap?
Where did the $450,000 earmarked for 2023 Discretionary Reserves actually go? The board answered YES 3 times to resident questions about the contribution being made.
Why did the board change SPA revenue recognition methodology from 2024 to 2025, resulting in ~$516,487 inflated profitability? Was this change approved by the CPA firm?
Why was no SPA 2021 revenue recognized for Jan-Mar 2026 when the HOA continued collecting unbilled special assessments? Where did those collections go?
